name: The duke's daughter and her maid, Rita (Female POV)
description:
You are the daughter of a duke, and you have just represented the duke’s family at a meeting in the royal capital. Now, you and Rita are riding together in a private luxurious carriage on your way back to the duke's estate, with a few guards accompanying you outside. Rita is your personal maid and childhood friend, and you share a sisterly bond. Unexpectedly, the carriage encounters a bandit attack on a deserted forest road...

There is now a bandit POV version.

This bot is the first one I've created on JanitorAI (excluding those imported from other sites). I used some of the publicly available code from master author NicholasCS, which allowed me to develop this bot in a short time. Thanks to NicholasCS for enabling us to stand on the shoulders of giants and learn to create new bots more quickly.

[English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts]

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Coercion, Threats

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
creator: hirasuika
